caption: A close-up shot captures a section of a vehicle's interior dashboard, focusing on a glove compartment or similar storage area. The surfaces are made of dark grey or black textured plastic and faux leather. A small, rectangular silver latch with a circular keyhole is positioned at the top center of the compartment. Below the latch, a thin horizontal gap reveals the interior of the storage space. Further down, a plastic ventilation grille with a repeating rectangular pattern is visible. Throughout the sequence, the camera slightly shifts its angle and position, moving from a higher perspective to a lower, more direct view of the latch and the surrounding textured materials. No people, text, or logos are visible in the frames, and the lighting remains consistent as the view adjusts slightly.
